Video.summary: Tony is asked to keep a young girl from being returned to her sexually abusive father.
Video.title: The Letter Of The Law

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pursue the killer of college student who was the brother of Hunter's old friend.
Video.title: Investment In Death

Video.summary: Hunter investigates the missing money from an old bust that implicates the police in criminal activity.
Video.title: The Fourth Man

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall find the murdered body of a call girl, and a toddler left unharmed in front of her tv set.
Video.title: The Baby Game

Video.summary: Hunter searches for the killer of a runaway girl whose baby he helped to deliver.
Video.title: A Girl Named Hunter

Video.summary: The case of a teenager who mistakenly shot his parents during what he claimed was a home invasion.
Video.title: Heir Of Neglect

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall are assigned to protect the Irish patriot brother of Devane's new lady friend.
Video.title: Shillelagh

Video.summary: The wife of a dead businessman becomes the prime suspect when it's discovered she was removed from his will.
Video.title: Boomerang

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the death of a multi-millionaire, whose four heirs become prime suspects.
Video.title: Murder He Wrote

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the murder of an art gallery owner involved in illegal sales of Indian artifacts
Video.title: Return Of White Cloud

Video.summary: In an effort make sergeant, Stan enlists an abused wife to catch her suspected drug dealer husband.
Video.title: Sergeant Kelly

Video.summary: Hunter becomes involved with a beautiful radio host when he goes undercover to catch a killer.
Video.title: On Air

Video.summary: Hunter defies departmental policy to save McCall from a kidnapper and bring her back to the police force.
Video.title: The Legion, Part 1

Video.summary: The only clue in a series of murders leads Hunter and McCall to suspect a colleague as the killer.
Video.title: Silver Bullet

Video.summary: By returning home to honor the one-year anniversary of his fiancee's death, Reno puts himself precariously close to Lt. Dixon's deadly clutches.
Video.title: The Hound

Video.summary: A desperate psychotic escapes from a prison with a plan for revenge against the men who put him behind bars: Reno and Bobby.
Video.title: Headcase

Video.summary: The five-year old disappearance of B-movie starlet sends Reno south of the border, following a hot tip from one of Bobby's informants.
Video.title: The Hot Tip

Video.summary: When crooked Circuit Prosecutor Eli Starke hires some local thugs to thwart the efforts of a group of ex-convicts trying to go straight, Reno comes to their rescue.
Video.title: Moody River

Video.summary: Reno's old friend, D.A. Harry Wells, recruits him to help find his daughter Dawn, who is being held hostage by her drug-dealing boyfriend.
Video.title: Vanished

Video.summary: A ghost from Reno's past appears and convinces him that his older brother Mitch, who went MIA over Cambodia 17 years ago and whom the government declared dead, is still alive.
Video.title: Fighting Cage, Part 1

Video.summary: Reno's only means of saving himself and his brother is to break the psychological hold that Bracket's lies have over Mitch by reminding him of their past.
Video.title: Fighting Cage, Part 2

Video.summary: Cassy arrests the District Attorney's lobotomized son for murder.
Video.title: Loyalty

Video.summary: The murder of a popular sex talk show host uncovers her hidden past.
Video.title: Talk Dirty To Me

Video.summary: A gubernatorial candidate is impilcated in the murder of a handsome male prostitute.
Video.title: Services Rendered

Video.summary: When a tabloid newspaper reporter stumbles onto a murder scheme, her reputation keeps Tom and Cassy from believing her story.
Video.title: Partners In Crime

Video.summary: Tom stalks a women seeking to avenge her own disfiguring injuries from a car accident by killing those responsible.
Video.title: Elective Surgery

Video.summary: Cassy suspects a jealous wife in the murder of her successful record producer husband.
Video.title: Appearances
